subjects.appearance_details: street-like path made of living orange, pink, and purple coral, textured ridges, glowing edges, and drifting bubbles
subjects.relationship: primary path experienced from a first-person flight perspective
subjects.location: center frame stretching forward through the underwater neighborhood
subjects.relative_size: large environmental subject surrounding the viewer path
subjects.orientation: receding straight ahead into the blue ocean depth
subjects.pose: fixed reef formation with gentle living motion
subjects.action: guides the first-person flight through the neighborhood while coral polyps sway subtly
subjects.state_changes: coral colors shift under passing neon glow; bubbles rise along the path; small polyps ripple in water movement
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: rough living coral in orange, pink, and purple with fine organic texture

subjects.appearance_details: fantasy homes shaped like clams, starfish, and seahorses, painted turquoise, emerald, and cobalt blue with soft window glow
subjects.relationship: neighborhood structures lining the coral street
subjects.location: both sides of the underwater street in midground and background
subjects.relative_size: small house scale compared with the vast ocean backdrop, larger than passing fish
subjects.orientation: facing the coral street like a suburban row
subjects.pose: stationary whimsical houses anchored to the reef
subjects.action: glow softly as the first-person camera passes by
subjects.state_changes: window glow flickers; water caustics slide across walls; parallax reveals varied creature shapes
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: painted shell, coral, and smooth aquatic surfaces with luminous blue-green highlights
subjects.facial_features: arched shell openings, star-shaped profiles, and seahorse-like silhouettes

subjects.description: colorful fish swimming through the underwater neighborhood
subjects.appearance_details: varied small and medium fish in bright blues, yellows, oranges, and silvers weaving around coral and houses
subjects.relationship: living movement filling the fantastical suburb
subjects.location: foreground, midground, and background around the viewer path
subjects.relative_size: small compared with coral houses and street formations
subjects.orientation: swimming in multiple directions around the forward camera path
subjects.pose: fluid schools and individual glides through the water
subjects.action: swim around the coral street as the viewer flies forward
subjects.state_changes: schools split around the camera path; fish scales flash in neon and ocean light; bubbles trail behind quick turns
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: shimmering scales in saturated colors with wet reflective highlights
subjects.facial_features: small eyes, fins, tails, and quick darting profiles

background_setting: A fantastical underwater suburban neighborhood under deep blue ocean water, with coral streets, creature-shaped houses, soft neon glows, drifting bubbles, and open aquatic depth beyond.

lighting.conditions: Filtered blue ocean light, warm neon accents, shimmering caustics, glowing house windows, and soft particulate sparkle in the water.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Filtered blue ocean light, warm neon accents, shimmering caustics, glowing house windows, and soft particulate sparkle in the water.

aesthetics.composition: Dreamlike underwater utopia, colorful coral architecture, first-person flight, gentle neon, floating fish, and saturated fantasy suburban detail.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Dreamlike underwater utopia, colorful coral architecture, first-person flight, gentle neon, floating fish, and saturated fantasy suburban detail.

cinematography.camera_motion: First-person forward flight through the coral street, smooth glide at neighborhood height, wide 16:9 view, and soft parallax past houses and fish.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Colorful aquatic magical realism with suburban whimsy and immersive point-of-view motion.
context: The viewer flies through an underwater coral suburb where living streets, sea-creature houses, neon light, and fish create a vibrant utopia.

actions.description: The first-person view enters a coral-lined street with colorful houses glowing through blue water.
The camera glides forward past clam, starfish, and seahorse-shaped homes as fish swim across the path.
Neon light flickers gently on coral and scales while the underwater suburb opens deeper ahead.

segments.description: Open from first-person perspective at the entrance of the coral suburban street.
segments.key_changes: coral street comes into view; blue ocean particles drift; warm neon glow begins

segments.description: Fly between colorful creature-shaped houses as fish weave around the path.
segments.key_changes: houses pass with parallax; fish schools split and cross; caustics move over coral
segments.camera: steady point-of-view flight through the street

segments.description: Continue into a wider view of the glowing underwater neighborhood.
segments.key_changes: street opens deeper; neon flicker reflects on fish; bubbles rise through frame
segments.camera: first-person glide with gentle upward reveal

temporal_caption: A first-person flight moves through a colorful underwater coral suburb lined with sea-creature houses and swimming fish.
audio_description: Muffled underwater ambience, soft bubbling, distant whale-like tones, gentle current movement, and subtle neon hum.
